creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 14:05:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    vietnamese/aspell    Makefile 
    vietnamese/gtk-im-vi Makefile 
    vietnamese/xvnkb     Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.6       +1 -0      ports/vietnamese/aspell/Makefile
  1.4       +1 -1      ports/vietnamese/gtk-im-vi/Makefile
  1.12      +1 -1      ports/vietnamese/xvnkb/Makefile
